title: DOUBLE SCAFF HOOK LANYARD
shortDescription: Fall Arrest 44mm Forked Webbing Lanyard made from high tenacity polyester (1.75m length). Consists of Energy Absorber with loop and Steel Scaffold Hooks. Allows movement in all directions while remaining safely anchored at all times
description: Fall Arrest 44mm Forked Webbing Lanyard made from high tenacity polyester (1.75m length). Consists of Energy Absorber with loop and Steel Scaffold Hooks. Allows movement in all directions while remaining safely anchored at all times

features: Fall Arrest 44mm Forked Webbing Lanyard made from high tenacity polyester (1.75m length)
Consists of Energy Absorber with loop and Steel Scaffold Hooks
Allows movement in all directions while remaining safely anchored at all times
Loops are protected by an abrasion resistant covering at the ends and prevent the webbing from being damaged by the metallic connector
